Off Calendar Oct-27-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-20-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for settlement on the record.
Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
John Worden, Esq. for Plaintiff Bandon Partners, LLC.
Matt Jacobs, Esq and Jessica Houts, Esq. for Defendant Ensequence, Inc.

Case settled and read into the record as follows:
Defendant agreed to settle in the amount of $550,000.00 to be paid in full within 30 days.
Plaintiff agreed to a full released.
Each to bear own fees and costs.
Counsel agreed to put the terms of the Settlement agreements in writing.

The Court deemed the matter settled, and placed the matter on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar in Dept. 212 for Jan. 20, 2009 at 10:00 a.m.
